title: CompassHUD
description: A mod that shows a compass and a clock on the HUD
body:
# **Compass & Clock HUD**

Enhance your Minecraft experience with a dynamic HUD that provides real-time information about your world.

### Key Features:

1. **Compass Display**:
   - Shows a compass on the screen to help you navigate.
   - Automatically sets the compass target based on your current dimension.

2. **Coordinate Display**:
   - Displays your current X, Y, and Z coordinates for easy reference.

3. **Clock Display**:
   - Shows an in-game clock to keep track of time.
   - Displays both the current time and the number of days passed in your world.

4. **Customizable Settings**:
   - Easily configure the position, scale, and color of the compass, coordinates, and clock through the mod's configuration settings.
   - Toggle between displaying only the compass, only the clock, or both.

This mod is perfect for players who want to stay oriented and keep track of time while exploring the vast Minecraft world. Configure your HUD to match your preferences and enhance your gameplay experience!
![Setting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ozueK4em/images/f21e4e4cbd09d5ce6aa86786429621d93acaaa98.png)
![Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ozueK4em/images/dab00e884fae4af66c7c1d8249cd67ec35338a13.png)
![Both](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ozueK4em/images/5e40508d0d800518b99509cdb195e9c18bd487c2.png)
